parents.subject: LU-20096 ldlm: alloc stats before procfs

commit.subject: LU-18934 tests: skip sanity/127f with correct version
commit.message:
LU-18934 tests: skip sanity/127f with correct version

The sanity test_127f osd-ldiskfs.*.io_latency_size parameter was not
actually landed until commit v2_17_50-123-gc688e33f11, so fix the
OSS version check in this subtest to match.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: c688e33f11 ("LU-18934 osd: Add BRW IO latency statistics by size")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I60d58a43cb8a9973f5fea44b352ffdae02783a14
